title: Unleash The Power of monday.com

posts.author: BeckyRichards (Becky Richards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Juliette,

Are we able to post our partner-led event in the community calendar? We will have 3 monday reps attending the event also.

https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/unleash-the-power-of-mondaycom-tickets-902328377467?aff=mondaycalenda…

Thanks
Becky

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Becky!

Yes! Actually been working on a process for this!

Essentially you can create the event as a “new discussion topic” and I will move it manually to our calendar ( we now created a special color for community led events)

Please fill out this form and follow the steps if you want to add an event to the community calendar:
